          <Description>Emit JSON instead of table output</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="limit" Value="N" Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[System.Int32, System.Private.CoreLib, 
Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]">

        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="password" Value="PASSWORD" Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Password (prompted if omitted)</Description>

        <Option Short="" Long="profile" Value="NAME" Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
